title: Chain 1/8: Make a List
scene: 周日早上，你和室友商量去超市买什么。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Fridge is empty. Grocery run?

turns.cn: 走，我要牛奶、鸡蛋、酱油、水果。
turns.en: Sure. I need milk, eggs, soy sauce, and fruit.
I'll make the list. You drive?
Okay. Bring the reusable bags.
Loyalty card's in your wallet, right?
Yep. Let's go.

title: Chain 2/8: Find Items
scene: 你在超市里找不到酱油，问员工。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Excuse me, which aisle is soy sauce in?

turns.cn: 亚洲食品在七号，或者国际食品区。
turns.en: Asian foods in aisle seven, or the international section.
Do you carry low-sodium?

turns.cn: 七号中间货架，品牌不多。
turns.en: Middle shelf in seven. Not many brands.
Where's the milk?
Back wall coolers, far left.

title: Chain 3/8: Organic vs Regular
scene: 买苹果时，室友问你选哪种。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.cn: 有机苹果贵一块五一磅，买吗？
turns.en: Organic apples are a dollar fifty more per pound. Worth it?

turns.cn: 做沙拉买有机，煮的话普通就行。
turns.en: Organic for salad. Regular is fine for cooking.
One bag of each?
Sure. Large eggs, please.
That's everything on the list.

title: Chain 4/8: Self-Checkout Issue
scene: 自助收银机扫不了条码，你叫店员帮忙。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.cn: 不好意思，这个罐头扫不出来。
turns.en: Excuse me, this can won't scan.

turns.cn: 条码磨花了，我帮您手动输入。
turns.en: The barcode's worn. I'll key it in.

turns.cn: 称重的那袋苹果也卡住了。
turns.en: The bag of apples on the scale is stuck too.

turns.cn: 请拿开重新放，绿灯亮了再扫别的。
turns.en: Remove it and place it again. Wait for the green light before scanning more.
It's working now. Thanks.
Call me if anything else comes up.

title: Chain 5/8: Forgot Something
scene: 结完账发现忘了买面包，你回去拿。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Shoot, we forgot bread.
I'll grab it. Wait at the entrance?
Sure. Get whole wheat.
Back in two minutes.
Okay. I'll pull the car around.

title: Chain 6/8: Checkout with Loyalty Card
scene: 你在收银台用会员卡结账。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Do you have a loyalty card?
Yes. Phone number five five five, zero one two three.

turns.cn: 一共五十二块三，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Fifty-two thirty total. Need bags?
I brought my own. I'll pay by card.
Insert or tap your card.
Receipt in the bag is fine.

title: Chain 7/8: Parking Validation
scene: 离开前在客服台盖停车小票。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Could you validate my parking ticket?
May I see your receipt?
Here. It's over twenty-five dollars.
Stamped. First hour is free.
Thank you.

title: Chain 8/8: Unpack at Home
scene: 你们买完东西回家，一起往冰箱里放。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Milk on the top shelf. Don't crush the eggs.

turns.cn: 酱油放调料架，水果洗一下。
turns.en: Soy sauce on the spice rack. I'll wash the fruit.
We shouldn't need groceries this week.
Right. Fried rice for lunch.
I'll prep the veggies.
Perfect.
